loadPaperNet.description: Load the paper citation network (PaperNet) into memory. Must be called before using paperNodeCheck, paperEdgeCheck, or neighbourCheck on PaperNet.

loadAuthorNet.description: Load the author collaboration network (AuthorNet) into memory. Must be called before using authorNodeCheck, authorEdgeCheck, or neighbourCheck on AuthorNet.

neighbourCheck.description: Get the list of neighbors of a node in a graph (co-authors of an author, or cited-by papers of a paper).

args.description: The node name (author name or paper title)

paperNodeCheck.description: Get metadata for a paper node: authors, year, venue, n_citation, keywords, doc_type.

args.description: The paper title to look up

authorNodeCheck.description: Get metadata for an author node: list of collaborative papers with co-authors.

args.description: The author name to look up

authorEdgeCheck.description: Get papers co-authored by two specific authors.

paperEdgeCheck.description: Check the relationship (shared authors, citations) between two papers.

check_valid_actions.description: List all valid actions available in the current environment state.

finish.description: Submit the final answer to complete the task.

args.description: The final answer (number, string, or list)
